page_metadata.biotools__summary: Java-based feature analysis tool that enables real-time, interactive correlation analysis of feature sets, discovery of addtional related features and analysis of related metabolites. It is designed specifically to aid feature analysis within NMR metabolomics data.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Java-based feature analysis tool that enables real-time, interactive correlation analysis of feature sets, discovery of addtional related features and analysis of related metabolites. It is designed specifically to aid feature analysis within NMR metabolomics data.
